title: Intersection Merge
description: Combine multiple types into a single type that must satisfy all requirements using the ampersand operator.
problemStatement:
Combining powers! Given interfaces `CanWalk` (with `walk()` method) and `CanFly` (with `fly()` method), create a new type `Bird` that intersects both.

**Requirement:** Use the `&` operator.
hints: Intersections are like 'AND'--the resulting object must have everything from both types.
expectedOutput: A type that requires both walk and fly methods
